\tzpentry{ID3647}{Photon Quantum State Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3647 introduces Photon Quantum State Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} |\Psi\rangle_{\text{photon}} = \int d\omega_s d\omega_i \delta(\omega_p - \omega_s - \omega_i) f(\omega_s, \omega_i) \hat{a}_s^{\dagger}(\omega_s) \hat{a}_i^{\dagger}(\omega_i) |0\rangle \end{equation}
